# Recall.bio

> Recall.bio is a digital legacy and emotional archiving platform that helps individuals document their life stories through daily prompts, voice recordings, text reflections, and photos.

## Core Value & Concept
- **Daily Reflection**: Users receive a personalized daily prompt tailored to their life stage to inspire meaningful reflection.
- **Multi-Modal Memory Capture**: Supports rich text, voice recordings with multi-language AI transcription, and photo attachments.
- **Digital Legacy & Heirs**: Users can invite designated heirs (children, family, friends) and configure when access to their emotional archive is unlocked.
- **Privacy & Security**: End-to-end user privacy with row-level security and private media storage.

## Key Links & Resources
- Main Platform: https://recall.bio
- Pricing & Plans: https://recall.bio/pricing.md
- Blog & Guides: https://recall.bio/en/blog
- Terms of Service: https://recall.bio/en/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://recall.bio/en/privacy
